facebook.caption: With a 4.8/5 rating from nearly 740 reviews, Bơ restaurant & coffee on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. Sitting on one of Phu Quoc's busiest strips, this spot earns consistent love from visitors who keep coming back. Whether you're stopping in for a slow morning coffee or a proper sit-down meal, it's the kind of place that feels easy and welcoming from the moment you walk in. Tip: a crowd-favorite like this fills up, so aim to arrive a little early during meal times to snag a good table.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the tables fill up fast at Bơ restaurant & coffee, and you'll understand why this place has nearly 740 five-star moments behind it. Drinks arriving, plates landing, guests settling in. On Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, this is the kind of stop that turns a quick break into a full-on highlight of your Phu Quoc day.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars, 739 reviews, and a spot on Phu Quoc's most iconic street. Bơ restaurant & coffee at Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is a no-brainer stop for food, coffee, and a proper rest. Get there a little early, trust the crowd.
instagram.video_caption: Nearly 740 reviews don't lie. Bơ restaurant & coffee is the kind of place you stumble into once and immediately add to your Phu Quoc must-return list. Coffee, food, good vibes.
